logs.message: WARNING: [HLS 207-5551] Invalid function level interface port in '#pragma HLS interface': expect 'return' (ColaFloatsToCounts/ColaCounts.cpp:7:39)

WARNING: [IP_Flow 19-4832] The IP name 'ColaCounts_fdiv_32ns_32ns_32_16_no_dsp_1_ip' you have specified is long. The Windows operating system has path length limitations. It is recommended you use shorter names to reduce the likelihood of issues.
